sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20484" key="bou/bastis2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βούβαστις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20484.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">groin</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.21</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβαστικά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remedies for sores in the groin</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
